name: Chicken and Bay with Tomato and Basil Salsa
recipeIngredient: 750 g large free-range skinless chicken breasts, cut into 2cm cubes
500 g tomatoes, skinned, deseeded, and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken breasts into six equal pieces.
2. In a bowl, combine the marinade ingredients: balsamic vinegar, honey, crushed garlic, olive oil, salt, and pepper.
3. Add the cubed chicken to the marinade and stir to coat well. Cover with clingfilm and refrigerate for at least 6 hours or up to 24 hours.
4. Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, adding two bay leaves on each.
5. Grill or barbecue the skewers until cooked through.
6. To make the salsa, combine vinegar, olive oil, sugar, salt, and pepper in a bowl.
7. Add chopped spring onions and tomatoes, then toss well to combine.
8. Stir in the basil leaves just before serving.
9. Serve with the grilled chicken kebabs.
